issues.objection: Tags on 7.24 (full-system-view, operator-system-coupling, system-recognition) cohere with same-tag verses across chapters. Anticipates Ch 8's adhyātma vocabulary; coheres with chapter-7 thesis's two-prakṛti distinction (visible artifact vs. operating intelligence). STRETCHED tagging keeps the operational scope honest where metaphysical reach exceeds it. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: Doctrine-coherence test for 7.24: same-tag verses across chapters preserve consistent stance; the verse extends the doctrine without contradicting prior chapters. PASS.
